sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتِ الأُمُّ أَنَّ سِعْرَ الأَرُزِّ ارْتَفَعَ هَذَا الأُسْبُوعَ.
sentences.translation: Majka je otkrila da je cijena riže porasla ove sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The mother found that the price of rice had gone up this week.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ كَمِّيَّةً أَقَلَّ هَذِهِ المَرَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je kupiti manju količinu ovaj put.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to buy a smaller quantity this time.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَتْ عَنْ بَدِيلٍ رَخِيصٍ فِي نَفْسِ الدُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Tražila je jeftinu alternativu u istoj prodavnici.
sentences.translationEn: She looked for a cheap alternative in the same shop.
She bought pasta instead of rice.

sentences.translation: Skuhala je ukusno jelo za porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: She cooked a delicious meal for the family.
